title: ScreenFixture
description: Screen-state seed payload consumed by the dev-only __seedFromUrl helper. Authored per project at docs/screens/webapp/fixtures/<screenId>.fixture.json — gitignored, regenerated each /build-to-spec-verify run. Source: feat-029.

version.description: Schema version. v1 only; future bumps go through screen-fixtures.ts migration.

screenId.description: Kebab-case mockup screen id (matches docs/screens/webapp/<id>.html + the [data-screen-id] attribute the page-root renders).

derivedFrom.description: Where storeState came from. mockup-auto is regenerable; flow-context + hand-authored must NOT be overwritten by the auto-derive script.

derivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the fixture was derived. Used by the seeder to flag stale fixtures (>30d old + mockup-auto = regenerate).

storeState.description: Opaque to the schema — the app's own store-slice contract (Zustand / Jotai / Svelte rune state). Validated against @repo/types at the auto-derive script's level.

routePath.description: Route the differ navigates to AFTER applying ?_seed=<screenId>. Most fixtures target home; sub-route screens override.

preActions.description: Ordered click/type/press/wait list scripts/seed-app-state.mjs plays before the snapshot fires. Used by flow-context fixtures to drive transient state (modal-open, search-empty, settings-tab-selected).
